sources.title: Monster. Mutt. 2011. DVDRip
sources.description: The Taylor's family dog, Max, is kidnapped by the evil Sirus Caldwell, (Zack Ward) CEO of mega corporation Envigormax, to be used as a test subject for a new super energy drink.

metadata.Plot: The Taylor's family dog, Max, is kidnapped by the evil Sirus Caldwell, (Zack Ward) CEO of mega corporation Envigormax, to be used as a test subject for a new super energy drink. When trials go terribly wrong, Max escapes only to be transformed from his lovable self into... "Monster Mutt"!
metadata.Actors: Rhiannon Leigh Wryn, Bart Johnson, William Brent
